reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content:
원래 쓰던건데 거의 다써가서 재주문 했어욥
디자인, 컬러, 냄새 다 좋아요
일단 비닐에서 향이 나니까 응아를 담아도 좀 가려주는거 같아서 맘에 들어요 :)
그리고 환경에도 좋다고 들었던 거 같아요.
환경까자 생각하는 바잇미 최고 ㅎ
그리고 한장씩 잘 뜯어지구(이거 잘 안뜯어지면 은근 짜증나는데 잘뜯어짐) 노랑이라 강아지가 볼 수 있는 컬러라 더 좋아요 :)
reviews.content_en: I was already using this, and since I'm almost out, I reordered! 😄 Love the design, color, and scent—all great. The bags have a nice smell right out of the package, which seems to help mask the odor even when holding poop, so I'm really happy with that :) Plus, I heard it's good for the environment. BITE ME is the best for thinking about the planet ㅎ And each sheet tears off perfectly (which is honestly so annoying when it doesn't tear well, but these tear beautifully), and the yellow color is great because dogs can see it too :)

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content:
3번째 구입 이에요 봉투도 좋구 통도 노랑노랑 예쁜데 연결고리가 좀 약한듯 합니다 그부분이 항상 말썽이네요
그부분만 좀더 보완됨 너무 좋을것 같은데 아쉽네요
그래도 다른 부분이 맘에드니 벌써 3번째 구매네요
reviews.content_en: This is my 3rd purchase! The bags are great and the container is a pretty yellow, but the connecting loop seems a bit weak. It's always been an issue with this one. If that part could be improved a bit more, it would be perfect, which is a shame. But since I like everything else about it, here I am making my 3rd purchase already!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 작년 여름에 구매했던 웁스백을 다 써가서 또 구매했어요! 생분해되는 배변봉투 중에 진짜 분해가 되는 친환경 소재는 몇 개 없더라구요~~ 그리고 심지가 종이라서 더 마음에 들기도 하고 포장재도 박스라서 너무 좋아요! 처음에는 야들야들해서 몇 개 많이 찢어먹었지만 이제는 노하우가 생겨서 너무 잘 쓰고 있어요 이벤트 너무 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: I used up the Oops Bag I bought last summer, so I got another one! There really aren't many truly biodegradable poop bags out there that actually decompose ~~  I also love that the core is made of paper, and the packaging is cardboard, which is awesome! At first, they were pretty soft and I tore through quite a few, but now I've got the hang of it and I'm using them so well! Thank you so much for the event!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 이건 없으면 안돼요 다른거 써봤는데 아 안되겟어요 이렇게 탄탄하고 야무지고 색까지 치명치명 한 이봉투를 아직도 안산사람은 없겟죠? 진짜 귀여운 봉투 향까지 치명적임 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: This is essential—I can't live without it! I tried other brands, but they just don't compare. Is there anyone who hasn't bought these bags yet? They're so sturdy, well-made, and the color is just deadly cute lol! The bags are truly adorable, and the scent is deadly too 😂

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
사용하던 배변봉투를 다 써서 알아보던 중에 성분도 좋고 이벤트도 하고있어서 구매했어요! 
옥수수전분이라 자연분해도되고 환경도 생각 하는 제품이라서 잘 사용하고 있습니다. 아무래도 매일매일 사용하는 제품이라 환경을 생각 안할수가 없는데 역시나 만족스러운 바잇미 제품이에요.

웁스백 이름도 귀엽고 캐릭터도 귀엽고 재질도 얇지도않고 좋아요! 
색상도 노랑색이라 귀여움이 한층 더해진것 같습니다.
reviews.content_en: I ran out of my regular poop bags and was looking for a replacement. I chose this because the ingredients are good and there's an event going on! Since it's made from cornstarch and naturally biodegradable, I'm using it while being mindful of the environment. Since it's a product I use every single day, I can't help but think about the environment, and BITE ME is definitely a satisfying choice. The Oops Bag name is cute, the character is cute, and the material isn't thin—it's really nice! The yellow color makes it even cuter, I think.

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 지금까지 써 본 배변봉투중에 최고!! 일단 입구가 너무 스무스하게 잘 벌려져서 빠르게 응가습득이 가능해요! 게다가 너무 얇지도 두껍지도 않아 응가가 밖으로 비치지도 않구요! 재질도 야들야들 너무 좋은 것 같아요 앞으로 웁스백만 쓸 것 같아요 ♡ 게다가 생분해봉투라니 ㅜ.ㅜ 유치원 가방에 매달아서 쓰기에 컬러도 너무 귀여워용 ㅎㅎ 좋은 제품 출시해주셔서 감사합니다!
reviews.content_en: The best poop bags I've ever used!! First of all, the opening spreads so smoothly that I can quickly pick up poop! Plus, it's not too thin or too thick, so the poop doesn't show through! The material feels so soft and nice. I think I'll only use Oops Bag from now on ♡ And it's biodegradable too ㅜ.ㅜ It's perfect for hanging in a backpack at daycare, and the color is so cute! Thank you for releasing such a great product!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
리드줄이랑 정말 찰떡이에요컬러가 ㅋㅋ노랭이 주황이
튼튼하게오래쓸거같아서 좋아요!👍🏻
reviews.content_en: It goes perfectly with the leash! 😄 The color—the yellow and orange combination ㅋㅋ Seems really sturdy and durable! 👍🏻

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 색깔도 넘귀엽고 디스펜수 없이쓰다 쓰니 너무 편하고 좋네요
reviews.content_en: The color is super cute, and using it without the dispenser was fine, but now with the dispenser it's so convenient and great! 😊

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
잘찢어지지않아서 너무 만족스러워하며 사용중입니다! 찢어져서 진짜 당황스런 일들이 있으셨다면 이똥츄 꼭 구매해서 사용해보세요!!
저는 손톱도 길고 성격도 조심스럽지않아서 비닐은 꺼내면서 벌리면서 똥을 주으면서 많이 찢어봤거든요,, 
타브랜드제품 찢긴 경험으로 진짜 손에 응아묻고,,뭐 너무 설명하기싫은 일들을 자주 겪었어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
진짜 이 제품으로 바꾼뒤로 한번도 찢긴적이 없어요!!!
reviews.content_en: I'm so satisfied because it doesn't tear easily! If you've ever had the embarrassing experience of bags tearing and spilling poop, definitely try this poop bag! I have long nails and I'm not the most careful person, so I used to tear through bags a lot while opening them and picking up poop. I've had really gross experiences with other brands—getting poop on my hands and other unpleasant situations I don't even want to describe lol. But since I switched to this product, it hasn't torn even once!!!

reviews.name: 길****
reviews.content: 제가 봉투 펼치는걸 정말정말 못해서(기본 1분 이상 소요) 산책 시작할때부터 봉투를 펼치기 시작하거든요 여느때와같이 산책을 시작하면서 웁스백을 뜯었는데 진짜 바로 스윽 하면서 펼쳐지던데요...? 그 뒤로 전 우리 댕댕이가 슬슬 자세를 잡을때 여유롭게 한장 툭 뜯어서 응아를 담을 수 있게 됐습니다 벌써 3롤째 쓰고있어요 다 쓰면 바로 재구매하려고요 응아냄새도 잘 잡아주네요 마스크 때문에 잘 모르겠는데 잡아주는거같아요 약간 그런 믿음이 있음...
reviews.content_en: I'm really bad at opening bags (it usually takes me over a minute), so I start opening the bag as soon as we start our walk. So as usual, I opened the Oops Bag to start our walk, and it just swiftly opened right away...? After that, I was able to calmly tear off a sheet and pick up my pup's poop as soon as he got into position. I'm already on my 3rd roll, and I'm planning to reorder as soon as I finish this one. It also does a good job of controlling the poop smell. I can't tell for sure because of my mask, but I feel like it's working... I have that kind of faith in it 😄

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
선물용으로 구입했습니다.
노란색 풉백케이스와 찰떡이에요 !
함께 사용하니 훨씬 깜찍합니다.
reviews.content_en: Purchased as a gift. It goes perfectly with the yellow pouch case! Using them together makes it even cuter.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 똥봉투 아무거나 쓰면 되지 하실 수 있지만 이정도 두께는 되야 찢어지지 않고 냄새도 안나요 굿!
reviews.content_en: You might think any poop bag will do, but with this thickness, it doesn't tear and there's no smell. Great!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
튼튼하고 견고합니다
리드줄 각각 달아놓고 쓰니 편하네요
reviews.content_en: Sturdy and durable. It's convenient having individual leashes attached to each one.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
항상 써오던 배변봉투예요~
생분해 되는것중 최곤거 같아요
향도좋고 잘 찢어지지 않아서 일년넘게 잘 쓰고 있네요^^
reviews.content_en: It's a poop bag I've been using for a while~ It seems like the best option among biodegradable ones. It smells nice and doesn't tear easily, so I've been using it for over a year now ^^

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
원래쓰던게 빡살나서 하나더 구매햇어요 ㅎ 
산책나갈때 넘편합니당!!
reviews.content_en: I ran out of my usual one, so I bought another! So convenient when going for walks!!

reviews.name: A****
reviews.content: 몇번째 구매하는 상품이에여 자꾸 잃어버려서 ..
reviews.content_en: This is my nth time buying this product because I keep losing them..

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 100% 옥수수전분으로 만들어진 생분해성 배변봉투라 친환경적이여서 일단 너무 좋아요. 또 귀엽게 노란색으로 되어있어서 배변봉투지만 귀여워요 ㅎㅎ 배송도 빨리 왔어요
reviews.content_en: I absolutely love that it's made from 100% corn starch, making it biodegradable and eco-friendly. Plus, it's adorably yellow, so even though it's a poop bag, it's actually cute ㅎㅎ The shipping was also really fast.

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 똥츄백 넘 기여워용 ㅎㅎ 색상도 노랑노랑하니 달고다니디 이뿌네여
reviews.content_en: The poop bag holder is so cute ㅎㅎ With the yellow color, it looks pretty when I carry it around!

reviews.name: B****
reviews.content: 환경을 생각해서 생분해성 봉투 찾다가 바잇미 봉투를 구매해보았어요! 얇은 봉투여서 응아냄새 다 밖으로 새겠지했는데 하나도 안나고 봉투자체에서 좋은 냄새가 나서 넘 좋아요☺️
reviews.content_en: I was looking for biodegradable bags to help the environment, so I tried BITE ME pouches! I thought with such a thin bag, all the poop smell would escape, but there's no smell at all, and the pouch itself has such a nice scent ☺️

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 아 이거 향도 좋고 비닐이 잘 벌려져요(?) 변 치울 때 비닐 뜯고나서 잘 안벌려질 때가 많아서 어떻게 보면 별 거 아니지만 되게 답답했었는데 요제품은 잘 벌어지기도 하고 향도 좋고 무엇보다 생분해된다는점이 가장 좋아요!!!!! 다 쓰면 또 살거예용
reviews.content_en: The scent is nice and the bag opens really well(?). Usually poop bags are hard to open after tearing, which is annoying, but this product opens easily and smells great, and most importantly, it's biodegradable!!! I'll definitely buy it again when I run out.

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content: 항상 사용하는거에요 ㅎㅎ 겨울에도 봉투가 잘 벌려져서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I use it all the time haha It's great that the bags open well even in winter

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 디스펜서 쓸 때 마다 고리부분이 너무 약해서 잘 떨어지는 것들이 많았거든요 ㅠㅠ  근데 요번에 바잇미에서 신상이 나왔다길래 사봤어요! 염려했던 고리부분이 뻑뻑해서 좋았던 것 같아요. 기존에 쓰던 배변봉투에 비해 사이즈가 커서 한 번 쓰고 버리기엔 아까울 것 같은 너낌이에요 😉 산책 가방이나 리드줄에 달아두고 다니면 귀염뽀짝 ✨ 그리고 향도 너무 쎄지 않고 은은한 향이 나서 응가 주을 때 코는 안막아도 될 것 같네요 :-)
reviews.content_en: Every time I used a dispenser, the ring part was so weak that lots of them would break off ㅠㅠ But I heard BITE ME came out with a new product, so I tried it! The ring part I was worried about felt sturdy, which was nice. Compared to the waste bags I used before, the size is bigger, so it feels like a waste to use it just once 😉 If you attach it to your walk bag or leash, it looks super cute ✨ And the scent isn't too strong—it's subtle, so your nose won't get blocked when your pup does their business :-))

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 똥츄 귀여워서 하나 샀어요!! 가벼울것 같기두 하구 환경에 도움 된다해서요 ㅎㅎ !! 귀여웡요!!!!
reviews.content_en: I bought one because Poop Chew is so cute!! It seems lightweight and it helps the environment too hehe !! So cute!!!!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 배송도 빠르고 제품도 맘에 들어요! 이제 봉투 낱개로 챙겨다니지 않아도 돼서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and I love the product! Now I don't have to carry individual bags around, which is great

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 자고로 풉케이스까지 귀여워야 산책할 맛 나니까요 ㅎㅎ 컬러도 귀엽고 친환경 제품이라 더 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: After all, even the poop case needs to be cute to enjoy a walk hehe The colors are adorable and it's eco-friendly, so that's even better!

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content:
바잇미 웁스백 롤 잘쓰고 있어요.
노란색 웁스백 롤에 어울리는 같은 라인인 디스펜서가 나와서 얼릉 샀어요ㅎㅎ
깔맞춤하고 산책시 리드줄에 걸고 다니니 이뻐요^^
reviews.content_en: I'm using the BITE ME Oops Bag Roll well. A matching line dispenser came out that goes with the yellow Oops Bag Roll, so I bought it right away hehe It's pretty when color-coordinated and hung on the leash during walks ^^

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 정말 너무 좋아요ㅠㅠㅠ 두께도 20micron으로 웬만한 풉백보다 두껍고! 찾다보니 다른 회사에 22짜리 보긴 했는데 디자인은 웁스백이 압승에 색까지 예뻐서ㅠㅠ 웁스백을 안살 이유가 없었어요ㅠㅠㅠ 바잇미에 또 예쁜 아이템들은 왜이리 많은지...!!!! 부드럽게 잘 뜯어지고, 뜨뜻한 똥의 촉감도 덜 느껴지는데다가.. 봉투가 생각보다 안 비칩니다. 완전 강력추천..ㅠㅠ 그리고 봉투에 똥 담아다가 묶은 상태로 잠깐 다른 곳에 올려놨는데 똥냄새도 안 배여나오더라구요!!! 사용 전 새 봉투에서 향기도 은은하게 나는 것도 좋고, 사용 후 똥냄새 차단되는 것도 아주 훌륭해요ㅠㅠ 앞으로도 웁스백만 쓸 예정입니다!!!
reviews.content_en: I absolutely love it ㅠㅠㅠ The thickness is 20 microns, which is thicker than most poop bags! I looked around and found other companies with 22 micron ones, but BITE ME's design is way superior and the colors are so pretty ㅠㅠ There's no reason not to buy BITE ME bags ㅠㅠㅠ Why does BITE ME have so many pretty items...!!!! The bags tear off smoothly, you barely feel the warmth of the poop, and the bags don't leak through as much as expected. Seriously highly recommend.. ㅠㅠ And when I put poop in a bag, tied it up, and set it somewhere else for a bit, the poop smell didn't seep out at all!!! The bags have a subtle scent even before use, which is nice, and after use, the poop smell is completely blocked—absolutely excellent ㅠㅠ I'm planning to only use BITE ME Oops Bags from now on!!!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
생분해성 배변봉투라 믿고~ 첨 주문했습니다^^
생각보다 ~배변이 그리 많이 비침없고, 
배변봉투가 잘 떼어지고~입구?두 잘 벌어지고-  
배변처리할때 신속히 편해서 만족하게 잘쓰고 있습니다^^

약간 아쉬운점은 봉투크기 사이즈가 살짝 작은 크기로
 출시되면 좋을거같습니다~ 글구 냄새가 독특하게 
느껴졌습니다;향긋한 향?그런게아니고- 뭔가 합성소재 
특유의 냄새섞어 나는..아리쏭한 냄새.. 
개인 취향..케바케니까^^; 
전 그래서 가까이 봉투냄새 안맡습니다. 
어쨋든 잘 사용하고 있어요~
reviews.content_en: Since it's biodegradable waste bags, I ordered with confidence ^^ The poop doesn't show through as much as I thought, the bags peel off easily, the opening spreads well, and it's convenient and satisfying to use when handling waste ^^ The only slightly disappointing thing is that it would be nice if the bag size came in a slightly smaller option~ And the scent felt a bit unique—not a pleasant fragrance, but kind of a synthetic material smell mixed in... it's a weird scent.. but that's personal preference, so whatever ^^; So I just don't smell it up close. Anyway, I'm using it well~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
드디어! 원하는 배변봉투를 찾았어요
얇지도 않고 탄탄하고
심지어 향도 좋아요!

요즘 다른 생분해봉투는 많지만
얇고 잘 찢어져서 , 그리고 입구를 벌리기 힘들어 불편했는데 

바잇미 웁스백은
탄탄하고 입구도 찾기도
편하고 침 안바르고 벌려좋아요
심지도 플라스틱이 아니라 종이 심지라
환경생각해서도 좋아요

색상도 밝아서 맘에들고요!
심지어 가격도 착하네요!
reviews.content_en: Finally! I found the waste bags I wanted No, they're not thin—they're sturdy And even the scent is good! These days there are lots of biodegradable bags, but they're thin and tear easily, plus it's hard to open the opening, which was inconvenient. But BITE ME Oops Bags are sturdy, easy to find and open the opening, and they open great without even needing spit The core isn't plastic but paper, which is great for the environment too. I love the bright colors! And the price is reasonable too!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 전에 쓰고 남아있던게 월래 있던게아니고 누가 준건데 어느날 산책나가서 처음 쓰려고 했더니 입구부분 잡고 여는데 부욱! 하고 찢어지더라구용 ㅜㅜ한두번쓰고 안되겠다 다시 사야겠다하고 찾아보던중 바잇미 웁스가 눈에 들왔어요 일단 너무 귀여움 ㅋㅋ 응아봉투도 너무귀엽! 그래서 바로 사고 택배도 엄청 빨리왔어요 친환경이라 좋고 생분해되는것도 너무 좋은거같아요 그리고 좋은냄새가 나더라구요 케이스도 너무 맘에들어요 병아리같음 이제 응아냄새 안날듯 다쓰고 또 구매하려구요 크기도 커서 대형견아가들도 충분히 쓰고도 남을거같아요 ㅋㅋ케이스 들은거 먼저쓰고 이거 쓰려고 아직 안뜯었어요 케이스는 지금 산책나가서 못찍음 감사합니다!
reviews.content_en: I had some left over from before that someone gave me, and one day when I went for a walk and tried to open it for the first time by grabbing the opening—riiip! it tore ㅜㅜ I used it once or twice and decided I needed to buy new ones, so I was looking around when BITE ME Oops caught my eye. First of all, it's so cute ㅋㅋ The poop bags are so cute too! So I bought them right away and the delivery came super fast It's great that it's eco-friendly, and the fact that it's biodegradable is awesome too And it has a nice scent ㅋㅋ I love the case too—it looks like a baby chick! Now the poop smell won't come out I'm planning to buy more after I use these up The size is big too, so even large dog owners should have plenty left ㅋㅋ I haven't opened this one yet since I'm using the case one first—sorry, can't take a pic of the case since I'm out on a walk now. Thank you!

reviews.name: C****
reviews.content:
배변봉투를 새로 사야해서 검색하다가
그동안 사용했던 게 산화생분해였다는 걸 알고
순간 아뿔싸~~했어요.
그동안 산화생분해도 생분해도 다 좋은 것이니 했는데
이번에 바잇미 웁스백 구매하면서 공부해서 
다른 걸 알았어요 

인증받은 생분해 제품에 두께감도 괜찮고
바잇미 디자인에 산뜻한 컬러도 마음에 들었습니다.
한손에 똥삽들고 한손으로 입구 분리하는것도
잘되더라구요.
라벤더 향이라고 하는데
강하진 않고
코를 대고 맡으면 살짝 향이 있는 정도이지 않을까 싶어요.

친환경 제품이라 애정갖고 보다보니
패키지 재질과  인쇄나 스티커등도 
친환경적인 방법을 사용해 주시면 
더욱 응원할 수 있을 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en:
I needed to buy new poop bags and while searching, I found out that what I'd been using was oxo-biodegradable 😅 I thought both oxo-biodegradable and biodegradable were all good, but after purchasing BITE ME Oops Bag this time, I did some research and learned the difference.

The certified biodegradable product has nice thickness, and I love the fresh color design of BITE ME. It works great too—holding the poop scoop in one hand and opening the bag mouth with the other flows smoothly.

They say it has a lavender scent, but it's not strong. It's more like a subtle hint of scent if you put your nose right up to it.

Since it's an eco-friendly product, I'm really rooting for the brand. If you could use eco-friendly methods for the packaging materials, printing, and stickers as well, I'd be able to support you even more! 💚

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content: 배변봉투 디자인 색깔 다 귀여워요 :) 다른 사이트에서 샀을때는 그냥 집고 묶기도 힘든 형태라 당황스러웠는데 바잇미 배변봉투는 위생적으로 집을 수 있고 묶을 수 있는 형태라 사용하기 더 좋아요👍🏻 그리고 무엇보다 생분해성이라 환경도 생각하고 1석 2조 입니다!!
reviews.content_en: The poop bag design and colors are all so cute :) When I bought from other sites, the shape was awkward and hard to grab and tie, which was frustrating. But BITE ME poop bags have a shape that's hygienic to grab and easy to tie, making them much better to use 👍🏻 Plus, they're biodegradable so you're helping the environment—it's a win-win!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
저렴한 똥츄부터 타사 초록색 베이지색 등 많은 풉백을 써봤지만 이 제품만큼 좋은건 없네요!! 잘 뜯어지고(타사 제품은 재봉선이 약해서 가끔 두 장이 이어져서 뜯어짐) 마른손으로 잘 열려요! 손에 물이 계속 닿는 직업이라 거칠고 건조한데 봉투 잘 열리는거 진심 너무너무너무 좋아요…
봉투가 도톰한건 다른 브랜드도 질 좋은게 많은데 이정도로 잘 열리는건 정말 없습니다 노 스트레스 비 해피..
행사 가격까지 하면 가성비도 역대급이에요ㅎㅎ 고마와요 바잇미!! 계속 좋은 제품 만들어주세요~~!!
reviews.content_en: I've tried cheap poop bags and poop bags from other brands in various colors like green and beige, but nothing compares to this product!! It tears cleanly (other brands have weak seams so sometimes two sheets stick together and tear awkwardly), and opens so easily with dry hands! I work in a job where my hands are constantly wet, making them rough and dry, so the fact that the bag opens so smoothly is seriously amazing... While other brands also have thick, quality bags, nothing opens this easily. No stress, all happy 😄 And with the sale price, the value for money is incredible! Thank you BITE ME!! Please keep making great products~~!!

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서
바잇미에서 이쁜 아주 이쁜 옐로우 배변봉투를
구매했어요..거기에  좋은향 라벤더까지
너무 너무 좋아요!
우리 애기들 응아 치울때 노란봉투 볼때마다
너무 귀엽단 생각이
reviews.content_en: I bought such a pretty, really pretty yellow poop bag from BITE ME... and it even comes with a nice lavender scent—it's so, so good! Every time I see that yellow bag while cleaning up my babies' poop, I can't help but think it's so cute 💛

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
다른 곳에는 더 비싸거나 1+1으로 저렴한 듯 해도 한꺼번에 좀 많은 양이다 싶었을 찰나 바잇미에서 딱 원하는 만큼 구매할 수 있게 돼서 너무 좋아요 사실 비숑 풉 파우치 쓰고 싶어서 이
파우치에 맞는 배변봉투를 구매하게 된 이유가 큰데 생분해 되는 점도 좋고 꽤 많은 양이라 괜찮더라구요 아직 써보진 않았지만 배변봉투 뜯을 때마다 이음새 부분도 다 뜯어져서 너무 짜증났는데 ㅠ 이 점만 괜찮으먄 재구매 의사 무조건 있을 것 같아용
reviews.content_en: Other places are either more expensive or seem cheap with 1+1 deals, but then you end up with way too much at once. So I'm really happy that BITE ME lets me buy exactly the amount I want! Honestly, the main reason I bought these bags was because I wanted to use a Bichon poop pouch and needed bags that fit it. The fact that they're biodegradable is great, and there's quite a lot in the pack, so I'm satisfied. I haven't used them yet, but every time I've opened poop bags before, the seams have completely torn apart which was so frustrating 😭 As long as this product handles that well, I'd definitely repurchase!

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content: 똥츄도 이쁘고 냄새 좋은거 쓰고 싶은 엄마 마음:) 근데 이거 써보고 다른건 확실히 못쓰겠어요!! 두께도 적당해서 펼치기도 넘 편하고 향도 좋아서 응가 깜빡하고 못버릴 정도예요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: As a mom, I want my poop bags to be pretty and smell good too :) But after trying these, I definitely can't use anything else!! The thickness is just right so it's super easy to open, and the scent is great—so nice I almost forget to throw away the poop! 😄

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content: 이왕이면 응아봉투도 예쁘면 좋쟈나여💛 노랑노랑 너무 마음에들어요!! 이번에 원쁠원 할때 싼 가격에 잘 산거같아요!! 생분해되는 봉투라고 하니까 더 좋습니다 :) 다음에도 또 바잇미꺼 살거예요!
reviews.content_en: I wished poop bags could be pretty too 💛 This yellow is absolutely perfect for me!! I think I got a great deal on this during the 1+1 sale!! And knowing that the bags are biodegradable makes it even better :) I'll definitely buy BITE ME products again next time!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
초록색 쓰다가 노랑이 구매해봄🥬
초록이가 더 탄탄하고 향도 찐함 품절이라서 노랑이
구매해봄! 바잇미풉백 크기도 크고 소형견 응가 치우기엔
풉백 좀 크다는! 크기만 조금 작으면 좋을듯!
잘 안찢어져서 최고! 최고!
reviews.content_en: Switched from green to yellow 🥬 The green one was sturdier and had a stronger scent, but it's out of stock so I bought the yellow! BITE ME poop bags are pretty big in size—maybe a bit too big for cleaning up small dog poop. It would be great if the size was just a little smaller! But it doesn't tear easily, which is amazing! Amazing!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
배변 봉투가 똑 떨어져서 옷 구입하면서 같이 구매해봤어요.
노란색도 마음에 들고 적당한 두께감에 향도 좋아서 저희 아이의 지독한 덩냄새를 가려줘요!
무엇보다 예전에 쓰던건 입구 한번 벌리는데 비비고 침묻히고 난리였는데 이건 바로 삭 펼쳐져서 너무 좋아요!!!
계속 재구매 예정이에요
reviews.content_en: I ran out of poop bags, so I picked some up while ordering clothes. I love the yellow color, and the thickness is just right with a nice scent that masks my pup's strong odor! Most importantly, with my old bags, opening the mouth once would involve lots of fumbling and frustration, but these ones open right up smoothly—it's so great!!! I'm definitely repurchasing continuously.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
생분해성 배변봉투에 관심이 있었는데 기존 것을 모두 사용하여 구매했습니다.
구매 전에 걱정되는 부분이 있었지만,
사용해 보니 향도 좋고 봉투가 부드러운? 재질이라 걱정했는데 찢어진 적도 없고 크기도 넉넉했습니다.
사용할 때는 절취선 끝을 잡고 찢으면 잘 찢어져요

무엇보다 생분해성이라 사용하고 버려도 환경오염 걱정도 덜 되서 좋습니다!
reviews.content_en:
I was interested in biodegradable poop bags and bought these after finishing my previous supply. I had some concerns before purchasing, but after using them, the scent is great and even though I worried about the soft material of the bag, it's never torn and the size is generous. When using them, just grab the perforated end and tear—it tears cleanly.

Most importantly, since they're biodegradable, I can use and dispose of them without worrying as much about environmental pollution!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
예전부터 사서 쓰는데 저희짖강아지가 중형경니랑 응가양도 좀되고 ㅋㅋ 제가 강아지처음키우는거여서 예전에는 일회용종디를둘고다녔는데 바잇미 풉봉지쓰고 다른똥봉지를 못쓰겠더라구요 ㅋ
한날은 다써서 집에 다른똥봉지를 들고갔는데 
산책하다보니 봉지가 ..터져서...손에랑 옷에랑 다묻었더라구요 ㅠㅠ 그이후로 바잇미 똥봉지가 좋고 냄새도안나고 환경에도좋고 소중하다는걸 느겼습니다  앞으로 계속쓸꺼같아요 다른거쓰면 또 
응가봉지가 토져서 똥범벅될까자 트라우마 생긴것같네요 오래오래팔아주세요 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: I've been using this for a long time, and my medium-sized dog poops quite a bit lol 😅 Since this is my first time raising a dog, I used to carry disposable poop bags everywhere, but once I switched to BITE ME poop bags, I literally can't use any other brand anymore lol 😂 One day I ran out and brought a different poop bag with me, and while on a walk the bag just... ripped... and got all over my hands and clothes 😭😭 After that experience, I really came to appreciate how great BITE ME poop bags are—no smell, environmentally friendly, and so reliable. I think I'll keep using them from now on. Honestly, I'm traumatized about the other bags ripping 😅 Please keep selling these forever! ㅎ

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
바잇미 와
예전처럼 배송이 너무 빨리 오네요!
너무나 만족
무료배송도 너무 좋고요
우리아가들 배변봉투 잘 쓸게요!
reviews.content_en: BITE ME wow! 😍 The shipping is crazy fast, just like before! So satisfied 😊 And free shipping is amazing too! Our pups will use these poop bags well!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 1+1행사로 정말 저렴하게 늘 사용하던 봉지인데 당분간 넉넉히 사용할 듯 해요! 비닐이 소리도 안나고 냄새도 좋고 색깔도 너무 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: I always buy these bags during the 1+1 sales for such a great price—I got a bunch this time so we're set for a while! The plastic doesn't make noise, smells nice, and the color is so pretty 💕

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
케이스가 생각보다 살짝 더 컸어용!! 자체 무게는 적게 나가는 것 같은데 막상 달고나니 살짝 무게감이 느껴졌어요.
소재도 좋아서 구매했습니다. 아 그리고 배변봉투에서 좋은? 향기도 나요ㅎㅎ 잘 쓸게요!
reviews.content_en: The case is actually a bit bigger than I expected!! It's lightweight on its own, but once I started carrying it, I could feel the weight a bit. I bought it for the great material too. Oh, and the poop bags have such a nice scent to them haha 😄 I'll use it well!

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content: 항상 봉투를 주머니에 가지고 다니다가 옷의 모든 주머니에서 똥봉투가 발견되길래 디스펜서가 필요할 것 같아 구매하게 되었어요! 노란색도 귀엽고 초록색도 귀여워서 2개나 사버렸네요 ㅋㅋ 고리가 약하다는 후기를 봤는데 예상보단 튼튼했고 잘 사용할 것 같아요 봉투에서 향기도 나고 이제 주머니에 봉투 안넣어다니고 깔끔하게 다닐생각하니까 좋아요 구매추천!
reviews.content_en: I was always carrying bags in my pocket, but then I'd find poop bags in every single pocket of my clothes 😅 So I decided to get a dispenser! The yellow is cute and the green is cute too, so I ended up buying 2 lol 😂 I saw reviews saying the hook was weak, but it's actually pretty sturdy and works great! The bags smell nice too, and now I can walk around cleanly without stuffing bags in my pockets—I love it! Definitely recommend buying! 👍

reviews.name: 표****
reviews.content: 노란색이라 눈에도 잘 띄고 봉투 잘 열리고 공간 넉넉하고 다 좋아서 계속 재구매합니다~
reviews.content_en: The yellow color stands out well, the bags open easily, there's plenty of space, and everything about it is great so I keep repurchasing it~ 😊

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
견고하진 않지만 사용하는데 큰 문제 없어 괜찮아요! 
이왕 쓰느 거 플라스틱보다는 몇 백원, 몇 천원 더 내고 환경에 도움이 될만한 제품을 쓰는 편이라 너무 마음에 듷어요
reviews.content_en: It's not super durable, but it works fine without any major issues! 👍 Honestly, if I'm going to use them anyway, I'd rather spend a few hundred or thousand extra won on something that helps the environment instead of plastic, so I really love this product! 💚

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
기존에 마이플러피 생분해 배변봉투 쓰고있었는데 비슷한 바잇미로 구매해봤어요~ 마이플러피랑 사이즈는 같고 색은 조금 연해요!
둘 다 거의 비슷한데 개인적으로 느낀 차이는 마이플러피는 좀 더 부드러운 편이고 그에 비해 바잇미는 아주 쌀짝 뻣뻣한 편이라 뜯어서 펼칠때 마찰이 잘 생겨서 좀 더 수월했어요!
reviews.content_en: I was using MY FLUFFY biodegradable poop bags before, and I decided to try BITE ME as a similar option~ The size is the same as MY FLUFFY and the color is slightly lighter! They're pretty similar overall, but the difference I personally felt is that MY FLUFFY is a bit softer, whereas BITE ME is slightly stiffer, so when you tear and unfold it there's more friction which makes it easier to work with! 👍

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 받아보니 실제로도 색상이 너무 귀엽고 적당히 두툼해서 너무 만족합니다!! 생분해성이라 더 맘에들어용 같이 구매한 강아지파우치랑 찰떡이에요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: When I got it, the color was even cuter in person and it's perfectly thick—so happy with it!! And since it's biodegradable, I love it even more 💚 It matches perfectly with the dog pouch I bought at the same time hehe 😆

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
✔️장점 : 좋은 냄새가 나는 풉백이라 산책하고 들고 다녀도 변냄새가 안나요. 그리고 바잇미에서 옷이랑 같이 살수 있어서 배송비가 더 안들어요
✔️단점 : 위아래 구분이 없어 뜯어서 펼칠때 조금 시간이 걸려요. 홀더까지 다 가지고 다니면 살짝 무거우니 사진처럼 여행갈땐 전용 홀더에 넣고 집앞 산책갈땐 한장씩 뜯어 클립에 끼워 다녀요 영하 5도미만으로 내려가면 뜯다가 찢어지는 경우가 있어서 사진처럼 낱개로 한개씩 클립에 끼워 다니면 괜찮아요
reviews.content_en: ✔️Pros: It's a poop bag with a nice scent so even after walks when I'm carrying it around, there's no poop smell. Plus I can order it together with other items from BITE ME so I don't pay extra shipping! ✔️Cons: There's no top/bottom distinction so it takes a bit of time to tear and unfold. If I carry the full holder around it gets a bit heavy, so like in the photo—for trips I use a dedicated holder, and for walks near home I tear off individual bags and clip them on. When it gets below -5°C the bags can tear while unfolding, so like in the photo, if I carry individual bags clipped one by one it works fine! 📸
